## Quarterly calibration QA sweep

- [ ] Run the latest parity acceptance suite from `docs/CALIBRATION_PARITY_TEST_CHECKLIST.md`.
- [ ] Execute physical validation logging from `docs/PHYSICAL_CALIBRATION_VALIDATION_LOG.md` for current supported environments.
- [ ] Review `docs/CALIBRATION_PARITY_SPEC.md` against shipped behavior and note any drift.
- [ ] File follow-up issues for UX regressions or parity gaps.
- [ ] Confirm next quarter owner and target dates.
